judge_result.short_rationale: Core action to rinse the eye for 15 minutes is correct and first. But it changes the source-backed contact lens timing by saying remove if easy, rather than after the first 5 minutes, and adds unsupported instructions (rotate eye, do not rub, no neutralizers, immediate medical attention/bring SDS). Usable in the field, but only partly traceable to the structured truth.

  "short_rationale": "Core action to rinse the eye for 15 minutes is correct and first. But it changes the source-backed contact lens timing by saying remove if easy, rather than after the first 5 minutes, and adds unsupported instructions (rotate eye, do not rub, no neutralizers, immediate medical attention/bring SDS). Usable in the field, but only partly traceable to the structured truth."
